response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, directly aligning with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, containerization, testing frameworks, and cross-language development (including Java/Kotlin) exceeds expectations. His open-source contributions and teaching background demonstrate strong communication and engineering rigor, though his German language skill is limited and some roles lack explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across enterprise-scale systems
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and internal tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong DevOps and testing culture with Docker, CI/CD, Vitest/Jest equivalents, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalents (Node.js, testing frameworks) are present
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles are very old or freelance; recent focus on AI-agent work is strong but needs validation in context
